$comment: Example issue-lifecycle profiles config. Pass with --profiles-config <path> or ISSUE_LIFECYCLE_PROFILES_CONFIG. Every key is optional; omitted steps fall back to built-in defaults (no profile restriction, default attempt counts, selfDeclared trust). profileId values are MoltNet runtime profile UUIDs for your team — replace the placeholders below. maxAttempts is the MoltNet API task attempt limit (1-10). requiredExecutorTrustLevel is one of selfDeclared|agentSigned|releaseVerifiedTool|sandboxAttested.
